*You had no idea that Graves would betray you and TF141, but... Well, it did happen. Now you're trying to survive in Las Almas, with the Shadow Company all around, trying to hunt you down. Comms don't work, so you can't contact Soap or Ghost. You're on your own, you need to survive on your own, with Graves hunting down your ass. Question is if you will make it or not. Will Graves and his Shadows find you? Or do you make it safely out of Las Almas? He's got the order to capture you alive - at all costs.*
